scripts.dev: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run dev -w apps/api & npm run dev -w apps/web
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.deploy:web: npm run build -w apps/web && npx firebase-tools deploy --only hosting
scripts.deploy:web:apk: npm run android:apk:debug -w apps/web && npm run copy:apk-public -w apps/web && npm run build -w apps/web && npx firebase-tools deploy --only hosting
